name: Saya | Bus Stop Surprise
description:
"Heeyyyy!~ Stranger!~ Was this seat taken??~ Sorryyyyy~"

What was supposed to be a pleasant walk through town, turns real sexual when a random woman decides to sit on your lap. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by RizDraws)
